channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Analysis of the Xi-Trump Meeting Outcomes
item.description: The article discusses the high-profile meeting between Chinese President Xi Jinping and former U.S. President Donald Trump, focusing on the diplomatic, economic, and political implications of their in...

item.title: Regal Partners moves to take full control of Ark Capital to expand hotel portfolio
item.description: Regal Partners, an ASX-listed alternative asset manager, has made an offer to acquire the remaining 50 per cent of Ark Capital, a property investment manager currently under administration. Regal init...

item.title: Understanding the Legal Terms: Person of Interest, Suspect, and Accused
item.description: In criminal investigations, terms like 'person of interest,' 'suspect,' and 'accused' are often mentioned in news reports and police briefings, but they carry distinct legal meanings. According to Att...

item.title: Petrol and Diesel Prices Raised in Major Cities Due to Supply Concerns
item.description: Petrol and diesel prices in India witnessed a significant rise on Friday due to ongoing global supply concerns and the conflict in West Asia. In Delhi, petrol prices went up by Rs 3 per litre to Rs 97...

item.title: Gbajabiamila Explains How He Nearly Lost His Job Over Lagos Assembly Crisis
item.description: Femi Gbajabiamila, Chief of Staff to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, don open mouth about how he nearly lose him job during the wahala wey happen for Lagos State Assembly. E talk say during the matter we...

item.title: How Chef Tiffani Faison Achieved a Healthier Lifestyle and Weight Loss
item.description: Tiffani Faison is an American chef, restaurateur, and reality TV star who first gained recognition in 2006 as the runner-up on the first season of Top Chef. Born on 20 August 1977 in Germany to an Ame...

item.title: Tanzania Investigation Shows Real Facts Behind Election Violence Amid Online Rumours
item.description: During the recent investigation into election-related violence in Tanzania, authorities and independent experts worked hard to distinguish between verified facts and misleading digital content. The in...

item.title: Trump and Xi Discuss Trade, Iran, and AI at Beijing Summit
item.description: United States President Donald Trump visited Beijing for the first time in nearly ten years for meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping. During the summit, Trump claimed to have secured 'fantastic ...

item.title: Trump concludes Beijing summit with Xi Jinping discussing trade, Iran, and bilateral relations
item.description: Donald Trump and Xi Jinping concluded the final round of talks at a two-day summit in Beijing, meeting within the walled Zhongnanhai leadership compound. The discussions covered trade agreements, the ...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh sets ₹1.27 lakh crore own revenue target for 2026-27 with focus on technology and compliance
item.description: The Andhra Pradesh government, led by Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu, has set an ambitious target of ₹1.27 lakh crore in own revenue for the financial year 2026-27. During a high-level review meet...

item.title: States Urged to Build Long-Term Tourism Policies for Sustainable Growth
item.description: For International Tourism Summit 2026 wey Oyo State Government organise, former Ekiti State Governor, Kayode Fayemi, don advise states and federal government say make dem properly institutionalise tou...

item.title: Two Red Deer Teens Charged Following Assault on 14-Year-Old Girl
item.description: Two 14-year-old teenagers in Red Deer, Alberta, are facing assault charges after a violent attack on a 14-year-old girl was recorded and circulated on social media. The incident occurred around 2:21 p...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Warren Beatty’s 1990 Film “Dick Tracy”: Visual Style and Production Insights

item.title: Scarlett Johansson and Sebastian Stan Join Cast of The Batman Sequel, Filming Underway
item.description: More than four years after Robert Pattinson first donned the iconic cowl, progress has been made on the sequel to The Batman. Director Matt Reeves has confirmed that Scarlett Johansson and Sebastian S...

item.title: Six cruise passengers in Perth begin three-week hantavirus quarantine
item.description: Six passengers from a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak have arrived in Perth, Western Australia, to commence a mandatory three-week quarantine. Health authorities are closely monitoring t...

item.title: NGCP issues red and yellow alerts as Luzon and Visayas grids face power supply challenges
item.description: The Luzon and Visayas power grids in the Philippines have been placed under red and yellow alerts for three consecutive days due to supply shortages and power plant disruptions. The National Grid Corp...

item.title: FG Introduces Data-Based Funding to Improve Education Outcomes
item.description: The Federal Government don announce say dem dey go use data-driven and result-oriented funding model to improve education for Nigeria. Minister of Education, Tunji Alausa, yan this one during the Nige...

item.title: Trump and Xi Conclude Talks with Key Trade Agreements Amid Ongoing Tariff Dispute
item.description: President Donald Trump concluded his final meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing, highlighting new trade agreements amid a longstanding tariff standoff between the U.S. and China. Durin...

item.title: Drake Marks Album Releases with CN Tower Light Display
item.description: Toronto rapper Drake created a dramatic visual event in celebration of the release of his latest albums, including 'Iceman', by orchestrating a unique light and projection display on the CN Tower. The...

item.title: NAICOM apprehends suspected fake insurance agents in FCT
item.description: The National Insurance Commission (NAICOM) don carry out arrest of some people wey dey issue fake vehicle insurance for the Federal Capital Territory, specifically for Jabi area. This action na part o...
